steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student is completing the sentence: "Ecuador is home to different types of volcanoes. For example, ______." The blank must name two volcanoes that are (1) each a different type and (2) correctly classified according to the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Chacana is a caldera volcano, and Fernandina is a stratovolcano.': The table shows Chacana is a caldera, but Fernandina is a shield volcano — not a stratovolcano. Fernandina is misclassified. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Chimborazo is a caldera volcano, and Imbabura is a stratovolcano.': The table shows Chimborazo is a stratovolcano, not a caldera. Chimborazo is misclassified. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Imbabura is a compound volcano, and Chacana is a shield volcano.': The table shows Chacana is a caldera, not a shield volcano. Chacana is misclassified. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Fernandina is a shield volcano, and Chimborazo is a stratovolcano.': Both match the table exactly — Fernandina is a shield volcano and Chimborazo is a stratovolcano. These are two different types, correctly identified. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
